TCP_PORT_1.title: TCP port 1
TCP_PORT_1.description: Generic raw TCP port for flows. Disabled by default; the admin picks the port number. A flow node must listen on it via ${TCP_PORT_1}. Bypasses the reverse proxy (no automatic TLS).
